productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ess 3s F Tee Navy Blue T-Shirts
description: Composition Navy blue short Sleeve sleeves Round Neck neck t-shirt made of 100% polyester, has fabric tape detailing on inseam of the neckline, three white stripes on the shoulders upto the cuff signifying the adidas logo, brand name and logo Printed on left chest, two silver stripes on the shoulder blades and engineered with ClimaLite technology Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Do not dry clean Say hello to comfort and spunk in this navy blue polo neck t-shirt from adidas. The stripes on the shoulder represent the Adidas logo and also add a dose of fresh colour and style to the tee. Engineered with ClimaLite technology, this tee draws sweat away from the skin to keep you dry and comfortable at all times. Wear this versatile tee for all your sporting activities and casual outings. Pair it with jeans or tracks for the wow effect. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1'', Chest- 38.5”
